metadata.name: ampa_prd_workflow
metadata.description: PRD-driven work item workflow for the AMPA engine. Covers the full lifecycle from idea capture through implementation, audit, and closure. Supports both manual (human-driven) and AMPA-delegated (agent-driven) execution paths.

roles.name: Producer
roles.description: Human stakeholder who owns the project vision, approves work items for closure, and gates human-review steps. Cannot be replaced by an agent.

roles.name: PM
roles.description: Product manager (human or agent) responsible for intake, PRD authoring, and planning. In the AMPA engine, this role is filled by the AMPA scheduler.

roles.name: Patch
roles.description: Developer/implementer agent that receives delegated work and implements it autonomously using the implement skill. Reports completion back.

roles.name: QA
roles.description: Quality assurance role that runs audits via the audit skill to verify acceptance criteria are met. In the AMPA engine, this is executed by AMPA.

roles.name: DevOps
roles.description: Handles CI/CD, deployment, and infrastructure concerns. Manages build pipelines, feature flags, and rollback procedures.

roles.name: TechnicalWriter
roles.description: Produces and maintains documentation, READMEs, and user-facing guides.
